_README: Mock JSON responses for ParkVision-Saathi API endpoints. Person 3 (Frontend) develops against these while real backend data is being built.
_NOTE: All coordinates are REAL Bengaluru locations from the dataset. Station names and violation types are from actual data.

GET /api/heatmap?time_bucket=morning_pea.description: Heatmap points for map layer — supports violation_density and congestion_risk toggle

GET /api/hotspots?time_bucket=morning_pe.description: Top-15 ranked hotspot zones by congestion impact score

GET /api/congestion/{zone_id}?hour=9.description: 6-component breakdown of congestion impact score for zone detail panel

GET /api/risk?hour=9.description: Risk scores per grid cell — used by existing backend routers

GET /api/forecast?zone_id=.description: LightGBM/CatBoost ensemble predictions for tomorrow's hotspots

GET /api/game/violator_adaptation?hour=9.description: Rational violator utility analysis — where violators would move

GET /api/game/spillover_forecast?hour=9.description: Waterbed effect predictions — patrolled, neighbor_1, neighbor_2, unaffected

GET /api/game/summary?hour=9.description: Aggregate stats across all game theory models

POST /api/simulate.description: What-if simulation: team allocation, coverage %, uncovered zones, spillover

POST /api/explain.description: LLM-generated zone explanation (cached or live from Gemini)

GET /api/traffic/{zone_id}.description: MapMyIndia enrichment data: travel times, road type, nearby POIs
